about.title: About ROOTS
about.description: Developed within the scope of the ATT (Accelerate and Transform Tourism) project of the Recovery and Resilience Plan, ROOTS is a tourism data monitoring platform for decision support in Barra and Costa Nova.
about.objective_description: Simplify data analysis and make decision-making more informed. We transform scattered information into useful knowledge about local tourism. Official data, organized and available in a click: visualize, compare, export. If you make decisions about the territory, this platform is for you.

footer.tagline_1: The Territory is Built by Many Hands.
